description: Baseline: 0 audit failures, 481 tests across 72 files. Starting deep warcraft-core exploration.

Fixed taskService.update() missing central preparedAt stamping for dispatch_prepared transition. startedAt and completedAt were centrally stamped but preparedAt was only set by dispatch-coordinator via Record<string,unknown> type widening. Any other code path to dispatch_prepared would silently miss the timestamp, breaking stale dispatch detection. Added package regression test + audit test. 484 tests across 73 files.

Fixed TaskStateArtifact missing preparedAt field: interface, taskStateFromTaskStatus, taskStateToTaskStatus, and legacy migration all dropped preparedAt, causing silent data loss in beads mode. Stale dispatch detection (doctor-tool, context-tools) would fail after process restart because preparedAt wasn't round-tripped through the bead artifact schema. Added audit test. 488 tests across 74 files.

Fixed beadDecoders.ts incomplete BEAD_STATUS_TO_TASK mapping: only mapped closed→done and deferred→blocked, missing in_progress, review, hooked, and blocked. Tasks with those bead statuses were incorrectly decoded as 'pending'. Replaced local map with canonical mapBeadStatusToTaskStatus import from beadStatus.ts. Added audit test. 491 tests across 75 files.

Fixed featureService.patchMetadata allowing status bypass: status was not in the immutable keys list, so callers could change feature status without triggering bead close/reopen or timestamp management (completedAt, approvedAt). In beads mode, this would desync feature.json from bead state. Added 'status' to blocked keys. Updated package tests + added audit test. 493 tests across 76 files.
